ERRules.GeneralRules1: Pharaoh Royals is a 3-reel, 1-row video slot featuring multipliers up to x10.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet for 1 line, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet for 1 line, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

ERRules.GeneralRules3: A bet line win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by the bet amount.

ERMultiplierFeature.Title: Multiplier Feature
ERMultiplierFeature.Explaination1: During any main game spin while the reels are spinning, Multiplier Feature may be randomly triggered.
ERMultiplierFeature.Explaination2: During the Multiplier Feature, the win will be multiplied either by x2, x3 x5 or x10 before wins are paid.

ERNudgeFeature.Title: Nudge Feature
ERNudgeFeature.Explaination1: During any spin, if there are 2 matching symbols on any of the two reels and there is a matching symbol not centred in the other reel, the other reel will have a chance to be nudged once to form a win.

ERGuaranteedWinFeature.Title: Guaranteed Win Feature
ERGuaranteedWinFeature.Explaination1: During any spin while the reels are spinning, Guaranteed Win Feature may be randomly triggered.
ERGuaranteedWinFeature.Explaination2: During the Guaranteed Win Feature, the result of the reels will guarantee 3 matching symbols.

ERFreeSpinFeature.Title: Free Spins Feature
ERFreeSpinFeature.Explaination1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing in a line will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins.
ERFreeSpinFeature.Explaination2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the 4 multipliers (x2, x3, x5 and x10) will be shown at the top of the reels.
ERFreeSpinFeature.Explaination3: During any free spin, one of the 4 multipliers will be randomly selected.
ERFreeSpinFeature.Explaination4: If there is a win and the x2 multiplier is selected, the win will be multiplied by x2 and that multiplier will be increased to x3 in the next free spin.
ERFreeSpinFeature.Explaination5: If there is a win and the x3 multiplier is selected, the win will be multiplied by x3 and that multiplier will be increased to x5 in the next free spin.
ERFreeSpinFeature.Explaination6: If there is a win and the x5 multiplier is selected, the win will be multiplied by x5 and that multiplier will be increased to x10 in the next free spin.
ERFreeSpinFeature.Explaination7: If there is a win and the x10 multiplier is selected, the win will be multiplied by x10.
ERFreeSpinFeature.Explaination9: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

ERMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
ERMaximumWin.Explaination1: The maximum win amount is %{2000}x of the bet amount.
ERMaximumWin.Explaination2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{2000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

ERWinningBetLines.Title: Winning Bet Lines
ERWinningBetLines.Explaination1: Only the highest win per bet line is paid.
ERWinningBetLines.Explaination2: Bet lines win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right.
